---
title: 'BLITZCRANK: Factor Graph Accelerator for Motion Planning'
author:
- Yuhui Hao
- Yiming Gan
- Bo Yu
- Qiang Liu
- Shaoshan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/dac23.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/BLITZCRANK
journ: DAC
year: 2023
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 70
---
